question:
Will ABNB's market close price on each resolution date listed below be higher than its market close price on 2025-03-30?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the market close price at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/ABNB for the resolution date. If the resolution date coincides with a day the market is closed (weekend, holiday, etc.) the previous market close price is used.

The exact value on 2025-03-30 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-03-20) was 126.000. (The latest market close price of ABNB.)
background: Airbnb, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates a platform that enables hosts to offer stays and experiences to guests worldwide. Its marketplace connects hosts and guests online or through mobile devices to book spaces and experiences. It also offers gift cards. The company was formerly known as AirBed & Breakfast, Inc. and changed its name to Airbnb, Inc. in November 2010. Airbnb, Inc. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
